title: The Plan to Strike Big Mom
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Pudding, Jinbe, Sanji, Big Mom, Bege as Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the assassination plot against Big Mom begins taking shape.
scene: Sanji and Luffy reunite emotionally, turning the rescue mission into a direct conspiracy against Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It's cool! I'll do it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Besides, I just thought up

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A super cool way to make my entrance! Shishishi!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Really? What is it?! what is it?! tell me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Nope! Can't spoil it just yet.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a a a a a a a a a a??!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: So much for me being all worried...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How reliable of ya. You know what the signal'll be, right?

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: When Sanji and Pudding Kiss, Right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No! We ain't gonna kiss at all! We can't!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's going to try and shoot me just when we're about to kiss! And I'm going to have to dodge it. So let her gunshot be the signal!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Oh! Okay! That's easy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Alright. Makes things simple. As soon as big mom screams, the ball's in our court.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You guys, focus on the rescue.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll focus on the assassination. At worst, you should be able to get it all done in ten seconds.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As all this stuff is going on, this idiot'll show up!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You mean this genius! Who are you calling idiot, idiot?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Listen up! As I, who can fly, make my appearance...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll be holding the mirror we're gonna use to escape! And this woman, of course!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't just randomly count me as part of your team!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Mama's gonna kill me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To be honest, I'm glad you all managed to bring Bruce with you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There ain't very many abilities in this world as useful as hers when it comes to escape!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As soon as you all finish your respective jobs,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Quickly jump into Caesar's mirror! Those around you should still be under the spell of Mama's voice.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All that's left after we're all inside is just running away through mirror world.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Y'all should prepare a mirror on your ship!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Someone who

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Gotta inform Big Mom Somehow...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That way, we'll all be able to escape as quickly as possible!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As soon as we each reach our respective ships,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This alliance is off! We hightail it out of big mom's territory! Every man for himself!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: May war's fortunes be with you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Okay!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Lookin' good, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: about two and a half hours left, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've gotta get back to my room. I am the groom, after all.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've gotta go, too. Gotta pretend like we're setting up the security.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Roger!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: When I make my funny entrance...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, Bege! I've got a favor to ask.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Quit Focusing on whether or not it'll be funny! You're gonna get yourself killed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: elsewhere totland islands

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Today, the day of the tea party, is a national holiday!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah, Lady pudding is finally getting married, is she?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Her groom is apparently the 3rd son of the Germa 66!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Milk Island cheese town

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Looks like we'll be making some strong connections!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's celebrate today with Supreme Beer and Cheese!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Nuts Island Peanut Town

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I heard that a family from the rufeld conglomerate arrived in the harbor yesterday!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The guests this time around seem really high-class!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Cocoa Island Chocola Town

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Lady Pudding! Congratu- Lations!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Not yet, silly!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: gyahahaha! It's okay! It's a happy day!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Sanji Returns storyline with 56 dialogue beats. Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the crew joins Bege’s risky plan to attack Big Mom during the tea party.
